headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 13, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels fell to the Cleveland Guardians in a 2-3 decision, with Angel Martínez leading the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run. Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters. The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, affecting their team's availability. Drew Pomeranz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation with the Los Angeles Angels. Dylan Beavers is on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 11, 2026, with a right oblique strain for the Baltimore Orioles. Grant Wolfram is also on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 9, 2026, with a low back strain for the Baltimore Orioles.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The Cleveland Guardians acquired catcher Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in a trade that sent left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations to the Giants. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a convincing 10-4 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Daylen Lile leading the charge at the plate. Lile's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort. Skenes threw 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Pomeranz Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-handed pitcher Drew Pomeranz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. The trade sent center fielder Alek Thomas to the Dodgers in exchange for Requena.
